title: Custom Heads
description: " Get the head " datapack adds a way to use the player head as you want for add details to your build.
body:
# Get The Head
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Get The Head** is a data pack / mod that hits to add a new way to decorate your buildings with the players heads. Some example from [https://minecraft-heads.com/player-heads/decoration](https://minecraft-heads.com/player-heads/decoration) : ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afc227fef550cc42c966abf4a47983f05527ae4d.jpeg) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) - **Head Drop on Dead** : When a player dies will drop his head. - **Customize the Player Head** : Throwing a _player head_ and a _written book_ the **SkullOwner** data of the head will be replaced from the **title** of the book. Personalize the datapack with the **config** function. ``` /function diesse:gth/menu ``` And if you need to **uninstall** it :(, type: ``` /function diesse:gth/uninstall ``` Check the wiki:
Youtube video
